CREATE TABLE xml_elements (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, element_name VARCHAR(255), attributes VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO xml_elements (id, element_name, attributes) VALUES (1, 'root', 'attr1=value1 attr2=value2');
INSERT INTO xml_elements (id, element_name, attributes) VALUES (2, 'child', 'attr1=value1 attr2=value2');
INSERT INTO xml_elements (id, element_name, attributes) VALUES (3, 'grandchild', 'attr1=value1 attr2=value2');
SELECT xte_node_from_nodebld('new_element', (SELECT element_name FROM xml_elements WHERE id=2)) AS result;
SELECT xte_node_from_nodebld('new_root', (SELECT element_name FROM xml_elements WHERE id=1)) AS result;
SELECT xte_node_from_nodebld('child_updated', (SELECT element_name FROM xml_elements WHERE id=3)) AS result;
SELECT xte_node_from_nodebld('another_child', (SELECT element_name FROM xml_elements WHERE id=(SELECT MAX(id) FROM xml_elements))) AS result;
WITH updated AS (SELECT xte_node_from_nodebld('temp', (SELECT element_name FROM xml_elements WHERE id=1)) AS temp_result) SELECT * FROM updated;
SELECT xte_node_from_nodebld('elem', (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(element_name) FROM xml_elements WHERE id < 3)) AS result;
SELECT xte_node_from_nodebld('nested_element', (SELECT xte_node_from_nodebld('child_1', (SELECT element_name FROM xml_elements)) FROM xml_elements)) AS result;
